
```{r}
n <- 100000
size <- 10
p <- 0.7

xs <- rbinom(n, size, p)

mles <- c()
for (i in 1:n) {
  mles[i] <- sum(xs[(size*(i-1)+1):(size*i)]) / size
}

hist(mles)
```

```{r}
n <- 1000
size <- 1919
p <- 0.5

xs <- rbinom(n, size, p)

walds <- c()
for (i in 1:n) {
  walds[i] <- ((sum(xs[(size*(i-1)+1):(size*i)]) / size) - 0.5)
}

hist(walds)
```
